commands: vite install -- --mode=update-lockfile # should install packages first
vite why testnpm2 # should show why package is installed
vite explain testnpm2 # should work with explain alias
vite why test-vite-plus-package # should show why dev package is installed
vite why testnpm2 -r # should support recursive in yarn@2+
vite why testnpm2 test-vite-plus-package # should warn about multiple packages and use first
vite why testnpm2 --json # should warn that --json not supported by yarn
vite why testnpm2 --long # should warn that --long not supported by yarn
vite why testnpm2 --parseable # should warn that --parseable not supported by yarn
vite why testnpm2 -P # should warn that --prod not supported by yarn
vite why testnpm2 --find-by customFinder # should warn that --find-by not supported by yarn
vite why testnpm2 --exclude-peers # should exclude peers by removing --peers flag
